   114→        /* Custom Masonry Utility for smooth columns */
   115→        .masonry-grid {

   125→        /* Inner Framing Component Specific Style */
   126→        .inner-frame::after {
   127→            content: '';
   128→            position: absolute;
   129→            top: 16px;
   130→            left: 16px;
   131→            right: 16px;

   134→            pointer-events: none;
   135→            opacity: 0;
   136→            transition: opacity 0.4s ease-in-out;
   137→        }
   138→        .inner-frame:hover::after {
   139→            opacity: 1;
   140→        }
